title: cogswellia mohavensis
intro: Cogswellia mohavensis, also known as Mohave globemallow, is a flowering plant in the mallow family. It is native to the southwestern United States and is valued for its medicinal properties. Cogswellia mohavensis has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever and inflammation, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, salve, or tincture, making it a versatile option for herbal remedies.
